prompt: Tap flop right slot to anchor late-street ICM closure context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_right is the board anchor, so the tournament read completes the flop texture before the pressure line moves on.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The right flop card is the target board card because late-street ICM closure still starts from the correct flop anchor.
